input.message: Building your Elite Cuts PRD now — two locations, 12 barbers, mixed commission/booth rent tracking, deposit collection, SMS reminders, walk-in queue, and full analytics dashboard. Give me a minute.

phaseResults: Setting up your project: Scaffolded 12 files

Designing your pages: Generated 2 HTML designs: User App, Admin Dashboard
Setting up your data storage: Generated 12 database files (entities + migration)
Building the backend: Generated 10 backend files (controllers, services, DTOs)
Building the user interface: Generated 12 frontend files (pages, components, hooks)
Wiring frontend to backend APIs: Integration included in frontend build
